text_block_list.text:
While out shopping, I notice Nice<n>Nature and
Matikanetannhauser out<n>with a young
Umamusume girl.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What about these shoes, kiddo?

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Yeah, I'll take those! Thanks,<n>Nature!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Awww! They look so cute and easy<n>to run in! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you like them. If you're<n>happy, I'm
happy.
choice_data_list: Out shopping with your little sister?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, nothing like that! I got to<n>know this kiddo
during my volunteer<n>activities.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: She asked us to help her pick out<n>some shoes!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Next time, with these shoes,I'm definitely gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ohooo, look at you getting all fired up.<n>That's kids
these days for ya.<n>Brimming with energy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's right! And sometimes you get<n>fired up too,
right, Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nahhh, definitely not. If anything, I get<n>humbled
before I even have the<n>chance to get fired up...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Individual training complete<n>and my legs
are feeling great. All<n>that's left is to actually win.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Argh! I tied with you again,McQueen?! Quit latching onto me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! The sentiment ismutual! I was supposed to seizevictory by a huge margin!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I couldn't... even... lineup... alongside... them...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Hahaha. Guess that's all I can<n>manage, no
matter how hard I try...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I got humbled...<n>Probably not
somethin' young folks<n>like you can relate to, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: That's not true... I can definitely<n>relate. I mean...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You're my Teio and my McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I'm just your average<n>Umamusume... A lot
of the time, I<n>don't even place in races.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But you! You're always placing inthe top five! That consistency isamazing! I want to be just like you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! But if you're going to be down on<n>yourself, I
can use this chance to<n>finally catch up to you!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this is our chance! We're<n>gonna surpass
you, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahahah! Hehehe! It's been ages<n>since I laughed
that hard.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Who'd have thought little old me<n>could get you
two fired up? Looks like<n>hope's not lost on the
young'uns<n>yet!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I guess that really does mean<n>I've gotta
stay on my toes.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I guess that really does mean<n>I've gotta
stay on my toes.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ack... W-well, I suppose I am still<n>somethin' of a
rookie myself...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm all fired up and burning<n>with passion!
I won't lose to you,<n>Nature!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, watch out, Nature! We're<n>coming for you!
Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
S-stop! Stop, what if someone hears<n>you?! Talk
about embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How do Teio and McQueenstay so calm when people say allthose cheesy things? They evenhave comebacks!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I think I need to prepare myself<n>mentally before I
even think about<n>challenging them...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh... so what, you gonna pour<n>everything you've
got into giving<n>guidance or something?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oooh! A strong opponent hasemerged! Now we've really gottafocus!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh... Personally, I'd prefer it if my<n>"strong
opponents" would ease up on<n>the pressure a
little...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But ah well... I guess I'll get some<n>new shoes too.
I've gotta be<n>prepared for any up-and-coming
challengers, after all.
